MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CPF-01-319549 WITH CASE CGC-03-421249
Off Calendar Jul-13-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sherri S. Kaiser, Deputy City Attorney (415) 554-4691 for Defendant and Moving Party City and County of San Francisco and San Francisco Public Utilities Commission
Sharon L. Browne, Esq., Pacific Legal Foundation (916) 419-7111 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Schram (#421249)
John H. Findley, Esq., Pacific Legal Foundation (916) 419-7111 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Coral Construction (#319549)
RULING:
Stipulation of all counsel that no additional briefing or record submissions are required for consolidation was read into the record. On the basis of the stipulation, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO and SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC UTILITIES COMMISSION'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS CPF-01-319549 WITH CGC-03-421249 is granted. Action No. 319549 shall be the lead case; all future pleaadings shall be filed in #319549 Coral Construction v. Martn. Order signed. (301/JLW/) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CPF-01-319549 WITH CASE CGC-03-421249
Off Calendar Jun-28-2004 Continued To Jul-13-04 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Sherri Sokeland Kaiser, Deputy City Attorney (415) 554-4691 for Defendant and Moving Party City and County of San Francisco
Sharon L. Browne, Esq., Pacific Legal Foundation (916) 419-7111 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Schram Construction, Inc.
John H. Findley, Esq., Pacific Legal Foundation (916) 419-7111 for Defendant Coral Construction, Inc. (#319549)
RULING:
A R G U E D; DEFENDANTS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A MUNICIPAL, SAN FRANCISCO PUBLIC UTILITIES COMMISSION'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CPF-01-319549 WITH CASE CGC-03-421249 is CONTINUED to 07/13/04 in Dept. 301. Counsel are ordered to meet and confer regarding the record of the actions as they exist now; whether the record should be augmented by Coral Construction and a supplemental briefing schedule. Counsel shall file with the Court, no later than noon on 07/09/04, their stipulation regarding the submission of documents and the briefing schedule.
